hunt_objective: Detect compromised credentials used for unauthorized access from foreign IP addresses
hunt_hypothesis: Threat actor obtained VPN credentials via phishing and is authenticating from Eastern European IP ranges outside normal business hours
known_benign_patterns: IT admin team uses VPN from home IPs in US and Canada
Backup service account authenticates every 6 hours from 10.0.0.50
prior_related_incidents: INC-2024-0892: Phishing campaign targeting finance department (October 2024)
analyst_notes: Client reported suspicious MFA prompts from two finance team members. No confirmed compromise yet. CISO requested proactive hunt.
constraints: No active containment actions without client approval
